seed_problem: Assign drones to delivery zones under per-drone capacity to maximize served weight; checker validates capacities and scores total value / baseline.
mutation: composite: generalize the input from a single homogeneous cost/value to fully pump-specific (agent-specific) consumption AND yield matrices, and tighten output so each block is served by at most one capacitated pump -- turning simple weighted matching into the NP-hard Generalized Assignment Problem where greedy/local-search/multi-restart heuristics diverge.
title: Thirsty Terroir: Vineyard Irrigation Scheduling
strategies: first-fit reference: scan blocks in index order and assign each to the first pump with remaining reservoir (the scored baseline)
density greedy: sort all (block,pump) pairs by yield-per-litre and assign each block to the best pump that still fits
local search with reassignments and swaps: start from greedy and repeatedly move/swap blocks between pumps to raise total yield
seeded randomized multi-restart: shuffle greedy tie-breaks across many deterministic restarts and keep the best schedule found
